title: Packwiz Modpack Loader
body:
# Packwiz Modpack Loader

Loads and (auto) updates Packwiz Modpacks.

### (Neo)Forge Versions
The mod should work if you install [Sinytra's Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) alongside it

## Usage
- Make a [Packwiz modpack](https://packwiz.infra.link/)
- Use `/packwiz link [URL]` to link to your `pack.toml` file
- Update the modpack using `/packwiz update`

## Permissions
- You can now set a [minimum permission level](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Permission_level) for calling the `/packwiz` command. By default this is set to 4 (Operator)
- This may be useful if you who want to give regular players (level 0) or those in creative (level 2) an option to link and update the modpack.

----
